description_long: This object is a cylindrical amber plastic prescription medicine bottle with a wide, ribbed white child-resistant cap. The bottle features a printed label with black text and a red cross symbol, indicating prescription information and dosage details. The label wraps around the bottle, displaying a barcode, storage instructions, and warnings about the medication. The cap appears to be made of opaque white plastic and is designed to be twisted open, likely with a push-and-turn mechanism for safety. The bottle is semi-transparent, allowing some light to pass through but obscuring the contents inside. The overall appearance is typical of prescription medication containers found in pharmacies and healthcare settings.
description: Amber plastic prescription bottle with a white child-resistant cap and a detailed printed label, including a red cross and barcode.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white ribbed cap and the plain amber bottle body with no visible label details.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the label with black text, barcode, and storage instructions clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the label with prescription information, dosage, and a partial barcode.
description_view_3: Side view showing the red cross symbol and dosage details on the label, with the cap and bottle body visible.
attribute_label_text: Pharmacist: Dispense in a tight, light-resistant container with a child-resistant closure. Each tablet contains 5 mg hydrocodone bitartrate (Warning: May be habit-forming) and 300 mg acetaminophen. Storage: Store at 20 to 25°C (68° to 77°F) [See USP Controlled Room Temperature]. Usual adult dosage: One or two tablets every four to six hours, as needed for pain. See package insert for full prescribing information. 5 mg/300 mg 100 Tablets 3 00743 04113 2
